square70x70logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 70 70'><rect fill='%230B2545' width='70' height='70'/><text y='52' x='35' text-anchor='middle' font-size='42' font-weight='bold' fill='%23C8A24A' font-family='Arial'>AP</text></svg>

square150x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 150 150'><rect fill='%230B2545' width='150' height='150'/><text y='110' x='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='90' font-weight='bold' fill='%23C8A24A' font-family='Arial'>AP</text></svg>

wide310x150logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 150'><rect fill='%230B2545' width='310' height='150'/><text y='110' x='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='90' font-weight='bold' fill='%23C8A24A' font-family='Arial'>AP</text></svg>

square310x310logo.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 310 310'><rect fill='%230B2545' width='310' height='310'/><text y='230' x='155' text-anchor='middle' font-size='180' font-weight='bold' fill='%23C8A24A' font-family='Arial'>AP</text></svg>
